hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/pen-.*-pendente\.md$/.test(f)){process.stdout.write(f)}else{process.exit(0)}})" | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ]; then npx markdownlint-cli2 "$f" 2>&1 || true; fi; }
hooks.statusMessage: Validando markdown do arquivo de pendências...
